title: Dark Coffe Curios
description: A warm and dark reimagination of the Curious in a fancy, coffee inspired palette
body:
![Dark Coffe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dba4b2d81d7b1ce44175622a65d88eee99a84f7e.png)
##  Dark Coffe Curios
This is a plugin designed for [Dark Coffe GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-coffe-gui).Of course, you can also use it alone. Due to the long period of time without updates from the original author, and I really like this resource pack, so I made this resource pack plugin myself
## Compatibility
This is what I created for my 1.21.1 integration package, but it should be compatible with most versions below 1.21
## Mod support
It is compatible with most modules that use Curious as a prefix. If you want any additional modules, you can let me know
